import pandas as pd
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def process_data(df):
    logger.info("Processing dataframe with %d rows, %d cols", len(df), len(df.columns))
    return df.dropna()


def analyze_results(df):
    summary = df.describe()
    logger.info("Summary stats: %s", summary.to_dict())
    return summary


def generate_report(df, output_path):
    logger.info("Generating report: %d rows", len(df))
    df.to_csv(output_path)
    logger.info("Saved to %s", output_path)
